captured_from: metsa purchases fixture (3252 rows), randomly subsampled at 50 / 500 / 5,000 rows. Each subsample loaded into the target Aito DB; _evaluate run against each.
method: scripts/capture_coldstart.py — see docs/cold-start.md for how to refresh.

snapshots.label: Brand-new tenant
snapshots.blurb: About one week of POs. Aito has barely seen each supplier; predictions are honest about it.

snapshots.label: Two months in
snapshots.blurb: Recurring suppliers settle into patterns; Aito's high-confidence band picks up most of the queue.

snapshots.label: Mature tenant
snapshots.blurb: Long tail covered, calibration tight. Confident predictions are right almost all the time.

note: Captured against a real Aito DB. The shape — accuracy rises, baseline stays flat, the high-confidence band's share grows while staying near-perfect — is the load-bearing claim. Specific values vary with the dataset's separability.
